channel.title: Recovery on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Recovery on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Bulk Restore for Azure Virtual Machines using Azure Backup
item.description:
Azure Backup adds Bulk Restore for Azure Virtual Machines in public preview. Customers can restore up to 100 VMs in a single operation to simplify large-scale recovery.

  • Source: Azure Updates
